task_completion.description: Access the three specified government websites
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open with tabs or the address bar showing the URLs for usa.gov, weather.gov, and nasa.gov.

task_completion.description: Adjust browser viewports to the required breakpoints (375px, 768px, 1440px)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the browser's Developer Tools open in 'Device Mode' / 'Responsive Design Mode' with dimensions explicitly set to 375px, 768px, or 1440px, OR the browser window manually resized to these approximate widths.

task_completion.description: Save screenshots for usa.gov at all three breakpoints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing the directory /home/ga/Desktop/responsive_audit/ containing files exactly named usa_gov_mobile.png, usa_gov_tablet.png, and usa_gov_desktop.png.

task_completion.description: Save screenshots for weather.gov at all three breakpoints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing the directory /home/ga/Desktop/responsive_audit/ containing files exactly named weather_gov_mobile.png, weather_gov_tablet.png, and weather_gov_desktop.png.

task_completion.description: Save screenshots for nasa.gov at all three breakpoints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing the directory /home/ga/Desktop/responsive_audit/ containing files exactly named nasa_gov_mobile.png, nasa_gov_tablet.png, and nasa_gov_desktop.png.

task_completion.description: Create a summary report of layout changes across breakpoints
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor open showing a file named responsive_report.txt containing notes about layout changes (e.g., menu changes, grid stacking), or the file visible in the /home/ga/Desktop/responsive_audit/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a real web browser with a graphical interface to view and render the sites
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a GUI web browser (like Chrome, Firefox, or Chromium) rendering the actual websites, not just terminal commands like curl or wget fetching HTML.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually captured visual screenshots rather than creating dummy files
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of screenshot tools being used (OS screenshot UI, browser capture node/screenshot tools) or image previews showing actual website content, rather than just 'touch' commands creating empty files.

integrity.description: Verify the summary report contains actual observations about responsive design
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in responsive_report.txt should describe actual visual changes (e.g., 'hamburger menu appears on mobile', 'columns stack from 3 to 1') rather than just copy-pasting the prompt instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: /home/ga/Desktop/responsive_audit. Target sites: usa.gov, weather.gov, nasa.gov. Required viewports: Mobile (375px), Tablet (768px), Desktop (1440px). Expected screenshot files (9 total): usa_gov_mobile.png, usa_gov_tablet.png, usa_gov_desktop.png, weather_gov_mobile.png, weather_gov_tablet.png, weather_gov_desktop.png, nasa_gov_mobile.png, nasa_gov_tablet.png, nasa_gov_desktop.png. Report file: responsive_report.txt.
